title: crotalaria subperfoliata
intro: Crotalaria subperfoliata, also known as the dwarf bush calotrope, is a small shrub-like plant belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria subperfoliata are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or ointment.
